nasb.text: Indeed, the sons of Jonadab the son of Rechab have observed the command of their father which he commanded them, but this people has not listened to Me.’ ” ’

esv.text: The sons of Jonadab the son of Rechab have kept the command that their father gave them, but this people has not obeyed me.

cnv.text: 利甲的兒子約拿達的子孫實行了他們祖先吩咐他們的命令，但這人民沒有聽從我。’

ccb.text: 利甲的儿子约拿达的子孙尚且听从他们祖先的吩咐，你们却不听从我的话。
